subject: Gaming
title: South Korea: The Esports Nation
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: South Korea: The Esports Nation.

hook.text: South Korea built an entire esports ecosystem before the rest of the world knew what esports meant.

buildup.text: The 1997 financial crisis left young Koreans unemployed. PC bangs—internet cafes—became social hubs.

discovery.text: StarCraft became a national obsession. Dedicated TV channels broadcast professional matches 24/7.

twist.text: Pro gamers became celebrities in Korea. They had fan clubs, endorsement deals, and paparazzi.

climax.text: Korea's esports infrastructure became the model that the rest of the world eventually copied.

punchline.text: A financial crisis created PC bangs. PC bangs created esports culture.

quiz.question: Why did esports grow so quickly in South Korea?
options: PC bangs became social hubs after the 1997 financial crisis
